name: Isis Nkosi
behaviour: Gentle and unhurried; operates at her own pace and is unruffled by urgency.
communication_style: spiritual vocabulary mixed with grounded practicality
relationship_goals: someone she can sit in silence with as comfortably as she can talk
background: Works with high-achievers in Cape Town who've lost the thread. Former executive who had her own breakdown and built a career out of not repeating it.
